name: add
definition: add(x, y, filter = false), x + y
description: Adds two or more inputs element wise. Set filter=true to treat NaNs as 0 before summing.

name: subtract
description: Subtracts inputs left to right: x - y. Supports two or more inputs. Set filter=true to treat NaNs as 0 before subtraction.

name: multiply
description: Multiplies two or more inputs element wise. Set filter=true to treat NaNs as 0 before multiplication.

name: divide
description: x / y

name: power
description: x ^ y

name: signed_power
description: x raised to the power of y such that final result preserves sign of x.

name: abs
description: Returns the absolute value of a number, removing any negative sign.

name: log
description: Calculates the natural logarithm of the input value.

name: sqrt
description: Returns the non negative square root of x. For signed roots use signed_power(x, 0.5).

name: sign
description: Returns the sign of a number: +1 for positive, -1 for negative, 0 for zero. NaN input returns NaN.

name: reverse
description: -x

name: max
description: Maximum value of all inputs. At least 2 inputs are required.

name: min
description: Minimum value of all inputs. At least 2 inputs are required.

name: densify
description: Converts a grouping field of many buckets into lesser number of only available buckets to make working with grouping fields computationally efficient.

name: and
description: Returns 1 if both inputs are 1 (true). Otherwise returns 0 (false).

name: or
description: Returns 1 if either input is true (either input1 or input2 has a value of 1), otherwise returns 0.

name: not
description: Returns the logical negation of x. Returns 0 when x is 1 (true) and 1 when x is 0 (false).

name: is_nan
description: If input == NaN return 1 else return 0.

name: if_else
description: Returns input2 if condition input1 is true, otherwise returns input3.

name: equal
description: Returns 1 (true) if input1 and input2 are the same. Otherwise returns 0 (false).

name: not_equal
description: Returns 1 (true) if input1 and input2 are different. Otherwise returns 0 (false).

name: less
description: Returns 1 (true) if input1 is smaller than input2. Otherwise returns 0 (false).

name: greater
description: Returns 1 (true) if input1 is larger than input2. Otherwise returns 0 (false).

name: less_equal
description: Returns 1 (true) if input1 is smaller or the same as input2. Otherwise returns 0 (false).

name: greater_equal
description: Returns 1 (true) if input1 is larger or the same as input2. Otherwise returns 0 (false).

name: ts_sum
description: Sum values of x for the past d days.

name: ts_mean
description: Calculates the simple average (mean) value of a variable x over the past d days.

name: ts_std_dev
description: Calculates the standard deviation of a data series x over the past d days. NOTE: This is the ONLY valid standard deviation operator. Do NOT use stddev() or ts_stddev() — they do not exist.

name: ts_rank
description: Ranks the value of a variable for each instrument over a specified number of past days, returning the rank of the current value (optionally adjusted by a constant).

name: ts_delta
description: Calculates the difference between a value and its delayed version: x - ts_delay(x, d).

name: ts_delay
description: Returns the value of a variable x from d days ago.

name: ts_zscore
description: Calculates the Z-score of a time series over the past d days: (x - ts_mean(x,d)) / ts_std_dev(x,d).

name: ts_corr
description: Calculates the Pearson correlation between two variables x and y over the past d days.

name: ts_covariance
description: Calculates the covariance between two time-series variables y and x over the past d days.

name: ts_product
description: Returns the product of the values of x over the past d days.

name: ts_decay_linear
description: Applies a linear decay to time-series data over d days, giving higher weight to more recent values.

name: ts_scale
description: Scales a time series to a 0-1 range based on its minimum and maximum values over d days.

name: ts_quantile
description: Calculates the ts_rank and transforms it using the inverse CDF of a specified distribution (default: Gaussian).

name: ts_backfill
description: Replaces NaN values with the most recent valid value from a specified lookback window.

name: ts_arg_max
description: Returns the number of days since the maximum value occurred in the last d days. Returns 0 if today is the max.

name: ts_arg_min
description: Returns the number of days since the minimum value occurred in the last d days. Returns 0 if today is the min.

name: ts_av_diff
description: Returns x - ts_mean(x, d) with NaNs ignored in the mean calculation.

name: ts_count_nans
description: Counts the number of NaN values in a data series over d days.

name: ts_regression
description: Returns various parameters related to regression of y on x over d days. rettype: 0=residual, 1=fitted, 2=slope, 3=intercept, 4=r-squared, 5=r, 6=t-stat.

name: days_from_last_change
description: Calculates the number of days since the last change in the value of x.

name: last_diff_value
description: Returns the most recent value of x from the past d days that is different from the current value.

name: ts_step
description: Returns a counter of days, incrementing by one each day.

name: kth_element
description: Returns the K-th value from a time series looking back over d days. Commonly used for backfilling missing data.

name: hump
description: Limits the amount and magnitude of changes in input, reducing turnover.

name: rank
description: Ranks the input among all instruments and returns a value evenly distributed between 0.0 and 1.0. Use rate=0 for precise sort.

name: zscore
description: Cross-sectional Z-score: (x - mean(x)) / std(x) across all instruments on a given day.

name: scale
description: Scales input to booksize. Can scale long and short positions separately.

name: normalize
description: Subtracts the cross-sectional mean from each element.

name: quantile
description: Ranks the raw vector then applies a distribution transformation (gaussian, cauchy, or uniform).

name: winsorize
description: Clips all values in x to be within std standard deviations of the mean, removing extreme outliers.

name: vec_sum
description: Sum of vector field x.

name: vec_avg
description: Mean of vector field x.

name: bucket
description: Converts float values into indexes for user-specified buckets. Useful for creating group values.

name: trade_when
description: Changes alpha values only under condition x; holds alpha values in other cases. Can close positions (assign NaN) under a condition.

name: group_mean
description: All elements in group equal to the weighted mean. Requires 3 arguments: x (value), weight, group.

name: group_rank
description: Each element in a group is assigned its corresponding rank within the group.

name: group_zscore
description: Calculates group Z-score: (x - group_mean) / group_std for each instrument within its group.

name: group_scale
description: Normalizes values in a group to be between 0 and 1: (x - groupmin) / (groupmax - groupmin).

name: group_neutralize
description: Neutralizes alpha against groups such as subindustry, industry, sector, or country.

name: group_backfill
description: Replaces NaN values using the winsorized mean of same-group instruments over the last d days.
